meaning: adj.后屋,密室,暗中的,私下的,密谋策划的场所,秘密完成的
examples: The judicial sleight-of-hand led Fang Xuanchang to suspect backroom dealings.
Too many well-conceived concepts have been compromised by unjustifiable backroom constraints.
They might, perhaps, have been disappointed that the game had lost some of its backroom edginess.
That, of course, would prompt criticism from conspiracy theorists about Goldman's backroom influence in Washington.
Hence the backroom struggle over potential federal legislation to allow states to modify those benefits.
